title: Jupyter Notebook Permissions Dialog
description: Configuration for the collaborative notebook permissions and access control system

roleDefinitions.title: Role Definitions
roleDefinitions.description: Defines the available roles and their capabilities

viewer.label: Viewer
viewer.description: Can view notebook content but cannot edit or comment

commenter.label: Commenter
commenter.description: Can view and comment but cannot edit content

editor.label: Editor
editor.description: Can view, comment, and edit notebook content

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Can view, comment, edit, and manage permissions

owner.label: Owner
owner.description: Has full control including deletion and ownership transfer

roleHierarchy.title: Role Hierarchy
roleHierarchy.description: Defines the hierarchy of roles from lowest to highest privilege

defaultRole.title: Default Role
defaultRole.description: The default role assigned to new collaborators

jupyterhubIntegration.title: JupyterHub Integration
jupyterhubIntegration.description: Settings for JupyterHub integration with permissions system

enabled.title: Enable JupyterHub Integration
enabled.description: Whether to use JupyterHub for user authentication in collaborative sessions

groupMapping.title: Group to Role Mapping
groupMapping.description: Maps JupyterHub groups to default roles

adminGroups.title: Admin Groups
adminGroups.description: JupyterHub groups whose members automatically receive admin privileges

permissionScopes.title: Permission Scopes
permissionScopes.description: Defines the available permission scopes and their mapping to capabilities

notebooks:comment.label: Comment on Notebooks
notebooks:comment.description: Permission to add comments to notebooks

notebooks:own.label: Own Notebooks
notebooks:own.description: Permission to delete or transfer ownership

enabled.title: Enable Cell-level Permissions
enabled.description: Whether to enable granular permissions at the cell level

lockTimeout.title: Lock Timeout
lockTimeout.description: Time in minutes before cell locks automatically expire

allowLockOverride.title: Allow Lock Override
allowLockOverride.description: Whether admins can override locks held by other users

showRoleLabels.title: Show Role Labels
showRoleLabels.description: Whether to show role labels in the user presence bar

showPermissionsButton.title: Show Permissions Button
showPermissionsButton.description: Whether to show the permissions button in the notebook toolbar

confirmationRequired.title: Require Confirmation
confirmationRequired.description: Whether to require confirmation for permission changes
